heading: Today
text: Sun giving way to clouds.  A chance of rain and sleet from Rt. 9 south late.

heading: Thursday Night
text: Any mix changes to snow, steadiest I-89 south, 1 to 3 inches. A dusting north to Rt. 2, cloudy far north.

heading: Friday
text: Early snow south ending. Mostly cloudy, a few sunny breaks west.

heading: Saturday
text: Spotty freezing rain early north. Mostly cloudy, a break of sun. Showers north late.
